info.title: Azure Arc Data Services
info.description: Manage Azure Arc-enabled SQL Server instances, databases, availability groups, failover groups, SQL Server licenses, ESU licenses, data controllers, and SQL Managed Instances through Azure Resource Manager. Query Azure Resource Graph for cross-subscription inventory.

post.summary: Invoke Azure Arc Data Services MCP
post.description: Model Context Protocol endpoint for Copilot Studio integration with Azure Arc Data Services management.

get.summary: List SQL Server Instances by Subscription
get.description: List all Azure Arc-enabled SQL Server instances in a subscription.

get.description: List Azure Arc-enabled SQL Server instances in a resource group.

parameters.name: resourceGroupName

post.description: Execute an Azure Resource Graph query to search across subscriptions for Arc SQL Server resources.

query.description: The Azure Resource Graph KQL query.

subscriptions.description: Subscription IDs to scope the query.

containerResourceId.description: ARM resource ID of the connected machine

currentVersion.description: Current version of the SQL Server instance

azureDefenderStatusLastUpdated.description: Timestamp of last Azure Defender status update

hostType.description: Type of host for the SQL Server instance

upgradeLockedUntil.description: Extension upgrade locked until this date

SqlServerInstanceUpdate.description: Partial update payload for a SQL Server instance.

lookbackPeriodInDays.description: Performance data lookback period in days

enabled.description: Whether client connection tracking is enabled

nextLink.description: Link to the next page of results

isContained.description: Whether this is a contained AG

isPrimaryReplica.description: Whether this is the primary replica

partnerManagedInstanceId.description: ARM resource ID of the partner managed instance
